name: Marcus Johnson
bio: Met during freshman year at Stanford. We bonded over late-night coding sessions and still debug life problems together.

name: Sarah Chen
bio: My first manager at TechCorp. She taught me everything about leadership and still gives the best career advice.

name: Emily Rodriguez
bio: Grew up next door and we've been inseparable since kindergarten. We try to take one big trip together every year.

name: David Kim
bio: We started working out together when he moved next door. Now we're accountability partners for fitness and life goals.

name: Priya Patel
bio: We survived organic chemistry together. She's now a doctor and we catch up whenever her schedule allows.

name: James O'Brien
bio: Sit next to each other at work and team up in online games every weekend. Best coworker turned real friend.

name: Aisha Williams
bio: We met at a local book club and discovered we have the exact same taste in fiction. Monthly book swaps are our thing.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Started a garage band together in 10th grade. He's still making music and I'm his biggest fan.
